scripts.build:ordered: bun run --filter 'agent-action-render' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-core' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-events' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-store-sqlite' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-sdk' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-frame-render' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-server' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-cli' build && bun run --filter 'hrcchat-cli' build
scripts.test: bash -lc 'for pkg in "agent-action-render" "hrc-core" "hrc-events" "hrc-store-sqlite" "hrc-sdk" "hrc-frame-render" "hrc-server" "hrc-cli" "hrcchat-cli"; do bun run --filter "$pkg" test || exit $?; done'
scripts.rebuild: bun run clean && bun run build
